stories.title: Lambiase Confirmed for McLaren — Verstappen's Engineer Drops a Bomb

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
BREAKING: Gianpiero Lambiase is leaving Red Bull for McLaren at the end of 2027.

Verstappen said he'd retire when Lambiase leaves.

The clock is now ticking. This changes everything. #F1

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Lambiase to McLaren. Marshall already at McLaren. Courtenay already at McLaren.

Red Bull is losing its best people.

And Verstappen said he'd stop racing when his engineer leaves. What happens now? #F1 #RedBull

article.headline: Lambiase to McLaren: The Engineer Bombshell That Could End Verstappen's Red Bull Era

stories.title: Verstappen's Future in Free Fall — Piastri-Red Bull Swap Talk Intensifies

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Max Verstappen: 7th in the championship, 74 points behind Antonelli.

Exit clause: leave Red Bull if not top-2 by the Hungarian GP.

Piastri linked to Red Bull. Verstappen linked to McLaren.

The biggest F1 swap in years might be coming. #F1

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Imagine: Verstappen at McLaren. Piastri at Red Bull.

It's not as crazy as it sounds.

Verstappen's engineer just signed with McLaren. His exit clause triggers in July. And insiders say talks have started. #F1 #Verstappen

article.headline: The Verstappen-Piastri Swap: Is Formula 1's Biggest Driver Deal Actually Happening?

stories.title: Canada Countdown — 7 Days to the First Sprint at Gilles-Villeneuve

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
One week until Montreal.

First-ever F1 sprint at Circuit Gilles-Villeneuve. Russell's home circuit (won here in 2025). Antonelli chasing a 4th straight win.

34 championship points on the table. Canada could change everything. #F1 #CanadianGP

article.headline: Canada GP Preview: First Sprint at Gilles-Villeneuve and Russell's Last Stand

stories.title: Norris's Championship Window Is Open — McLaren's Dark Horse

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Lando Norris is 49 points behind Antonelli.

P2 in Miami. McLaren's car is improving. And he's the defending world champion.

Don't write him off. Canada is a Norris circuit. #F1 #LandoNorris

article.headline: Lando Norris Is 49 Points Back and Closing — Don't Count Out the Champion

stories.title: Ferrari Under Pressure — Leclerc Needs a Bounce-Back in Montreal

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Ferrari's constructors' lead: 44 points after Japan → 16 points after Miami.

Leclerc's final-lap spin and 20-second penalty cost them dearly.

Canada is a reset opportunity. But the pressure is rising at Maranello. #F1 #Ferrari

article.headline: Ferrari's Constructors Lead Has Collapsed — Canada Must Be a Reset
